prompt: Create an ultra-detailed fantasy cosmic illustration in a wide 16:9 cinematic canvas. At the center foreground, depict one athletic celestial female archer named Stellaria, dancing in a dynamic side-facing pose while drawing a gigantic ornate golden astrolabe bow; her face is intentionally hidden by one smooth peach-colored square mask with no facial features. She has long flowing golden blonde hair, jeweled arm cuffs, a black-and-gold embroidered cropped top, transparent veils, layered harem pants in deep blue and silver, gold sandals, chains, gems, tassels, star charms, and swirling ribbons. The bow is extremely intricate, made of gold clockwork rings, celestial arcs, gears, filigree, zodiac markings, and blue enamel, firing one glowing magenta-and-gold arrow diagonally toward the upper right. Include exactly one large falcon on the upper left, wings spread, decorated with gold armor-like feather details. The setting is a surreal ancient-cosmic civilization combining Egyptian, Babylonian, and astronomical motifs: a vast circular floor covered in glowing gold star maps, radial astrolabe rings, constellation diagrams, and mechanical glyphs; one black cube in the lower left foreground; one distant pyramid near the left horizon; one enormous stepped golden temple tower on the right; one tall ornate gate-like pillar at the far right edge; and one black-and-gold engraved obelisk or stele just right of center. The sky is a dense deep-blue and violet galaxy full of stars, nebulae, constellations, fine line diagrams, and exactly four bright meteor or light streaks. The horizon glows with an orange sunset on the left, blending into a dark starry night overhead. Use maximal detail, jewel-tone saturation, radiant gold linework, glittering particles, dramatic rim lighting, impossible ornate architecture, and a sense of beautiful controlled visual overload. No readable text, no watermark, no modern objects, and keep the composition sharp, high contrast, and fantastical.
